C1.summary: README + docs/SETUP.md + cross-platform scripts/distribute.mjs (config-driven) + .example + .gitignore + eslint scripts block + 13-test hermetic suite

C2.summary: 4-step first-run wizard (admin->project->connect->done) + mcp-config-snippet.tsx, reusing use-agent-pool/use-projects; web tests 66 pass

concurrency: C1, C2 concurrency-eligible; plan+verify ran in parallel, execute serialized (shared-branch git-index safety)
open_issues: REPO HYGIENE (separate follow-up, NOT done): no .gitattributes + Windows autocrlf + prettier endOfLine:lf ⇒ whole-repo `pnpm format` rewrites ~310 files. The C1 executor triggered this; the churn was stashed then dropped (zero real work). Fix: add .gitattributes (* text=auto eol=lf), a one-time normalization commit, pin prettier endOfLine. Until then executors must format ONLY their own files, never `pnpm format`.
C2 'done' Step union member is represented via a createdPool flag rather than a distinct step value (harmless).
